mapper.select: SELECT p.id AS post_id, p.caption, p.has_location, p.latitude, p.longitude, p.created_at, i.id AS image_id, i.sort_order, i.path AS image_path, i.content_type, i.size_bytes, i.width, i.height FROM posts p LEFT JOIN post_images i ON p.id = i.post_id WHERE p.id = #{postId}

SELECT p.id AS post_id, p.caption, p.has_location, p.latitude, p.longitude, p.created_at, i.id AS image_id, i.sort_order, i.path AS image_path, i.content_type, i.size_bytes, i.width, i.height FROM posts p LEFT JOIN post_images i ON p.id = i.post_id WHERE p.has_location = true AND p.latitude BETWEEN #{minLat} AND #{maxLat} AND p.longitude BETWEEN #{minLng} AND #{maxLng} ORDER BY p.created_at DESC, p.id DESC
